title: Figure 4 in A quantitative method for collecting water mites in lotic, riffle-run habitats for water quality biomonitoring
author: Stenger, Logan R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 An example of the collection process proposed in this manuscript. a – the collector stands upstream of the net and disturbs the substrate; b – a typical collection setup that includes one person shoveling and another holding the net; c – water mites become suspended in the water column and flow downstream into the net.
steps_raw: Figure 4 An example of the collection process proposed in this manuscript. a – the collector stands upstream of the net and disturbs the substrate; b – a typical collection setup that includes one person shoveling and another holding the net; c – water mites become suspended in the water column and flow downstream into the net.
